title: Repair top signature and symbol linkage
route: Use for compile errors involving not declared, no matching function, undefined reference, or wrong top signature.
summary: Match the implementation exactly to the header and top.txt; keep argument order, pointer/reference qualifiers, typedefs, and extern linkage compatible with the testbench.
anti_patterns: do not edit header or testbench
do not rename the top function
risk: Low if the header is treated as the source of truth.
